creator: sharky@schaack.io
text:
I am new to ports and how building freebsd ports , but this bug need be fixed :) . I now understand what Kirill is saying. He removed the patch two years ago since then salt work still working and all other changes doesn't seem related to contextvars.

The problem on the recent build is that contextvars is not installed in the environment. 

I downloaded the latest salt src and check the set git repo what was changed there in the base.txt there was a change in the November 22

https://github.com/saltstack/salt/commit/87ac8341e5a48423975516f7b992c566b27c7ea4

This should ensure that contextvars is installed , but it isn't right ? 

The date may be confusing , but I think this comment was first seen on 3006 builds . 

Could the comment in the requirements the problem ? 

I am currently building salt via poudriere to see if the problem still exists.
